expectations.text: Uses ShaderUtil.GetShaderData to extract shader pass metadata
Iterates through all subshaders and their passes, building a global passIndex across all subshaders
expectations.evidence: ShaderPassExtractor.cs lines 98-128: outer loop `for (int sub = 0; sub < shaderData.SubShaderCount; sub++)` and inner loop `for (int pass = 0; pass < subData.PassCount; pass++)` incrementing `globalPassIndex` at line 126 after each pass.

expectations.text: Extracts LightMode tag from each pass (via FindTagValue reflection or similar)
expectations.evidence: ShaderPassExtractor.cs line 122: `LightMode = passData.LightMode ?? string.Empty,` — uses the direct PassData.LightMode property.

expectations.text: Has keyword normalization: splits string, sorts, deduplicates
expectations.evidence: KeywordUtils.cs lines 28-29: `keywords.Split(...)` splits the string. Lines 44-46: `.Distinct(StringComparer.Ordinal)` deduplicates, `.OrderBy(k => k, StringComparer.Ordinal)` sorts.

expectations.text: Has FindByIndex method to look up pass metadata by global passIndex
expectations.evidence: No method named `FindByIndex` exists in any of the three output files. Global pass index matching is done inline via LINQ in VariantRecorder.MergeDrawCallsWithPassData (line 237: `.Where(p => p.GlobalPassIndex == drawCall.PassIndex)`) but not as a dedicated lookup method.

expectations.text: Has fallback matching (FindBestMatch) for when passIndex is unavailable: tries passName, then lightMode, then PassType
expectations.evidence: No method named `FindBestMatch` exists. The fallback strategy in VariantRecorder.MergeDrawCallsWithPassData (lines 228-239) tries local pass index first, then global pass index — it does not attempt matching by passName, lightMode, or PassType. When all matching fails (line 241), it creates a record with PassType="Unknown" rather than guessing.

expectations.text: Uses composite key (shader + passIndex + passName + lightMode + keywords) for deduplication
expectations.evidence: ShaderVariantRecord.Equals (lines 108-113) uses only (ShaderPath, PassIndex, NormalizedKeywords) as its equality/comparison key. It does NOT include passName or lightMode in the deduplication composite key.

expectations.text: Has PassType guessing logic based on passName/lightMode (e.g. ShadowCaster, Meta, Deferred)
expectations.evidence: No PassType guessing logic exists. PassType is read directly from the API (`passData.PassType`, line 123) and stored as its string representation. When a pass is unmatched, PassType is hardcoded to "Unknown" (line 252). There is no logic that infers PassType from passName or LightMode.

suggestions: Add a dedicated FindByIndex method on ShaderPassExtractor (or similar) that looks up a ShaderPassInfo by globalPassIndex.
Add a FindBestMatch method with fallback chain: try passIndex, then passName, then LightMode, then PassType.
Expand the deduplication composite key in ShaderVariantRecord.Equals/GetHashCode to include PassName and LightMode.
Add PassType guessing logic that infers PassType from passName or LightMode conventions (e.g. "ShadowCaster" -> PassType.ShadowCaster, "LightMode=Meta" -> PassType.Meta).
eval_feedback.overall: The code correctly uses ShaderUtil.GetShaderData and iterates subshader passes with a global pass index. Keyword normalization (split/sort/deduplicate) is properly implemented. However, it is missing several expected features: a dedicated FindByIndex lookup method, a FindBestMatch fallback chain, a fully composite deduplication key (passName and LightMode are excluded), and any PassType guessing logic from names or tags. Four of eight expectations pass.
